feedback.text: Hi. I have seen that there are already a lot of other comments talking more extensively about video games; so I would like to talk about another problem that also concerns me a lot. The power that payment processors (like visa and mastercard) have to dictate what you can and can't spend your money on even if it is completely legal, controlling the ability of any company to do business if they don't follow their rules. It's like a mafia-monopoly and I don't think they should have that much control. For a while now they have been doing this for books, art and adult content, censoring all content they deem inappropriate even if it is perfectly legal. And in the last few days they have censored thousands of games that have nothing illegal in them. I hope that this will be taken into account to prevent these monopolies from controlling what I can spend my money on as a consumer, and how the sellers can earn it.
